name: Stale 0DTE Defensive Fallback
risk: Sample is small, so tighter fallback structure may overfit and remove positive stale trades without improving full-sample objective.
trigger: 0DTE state is STALE_0DTE or EXPIRED_0DTE and routing uses ES-only no-0DTE fallback profiles.
validation_metric: Fallback average MAE improves and fallback PnL/exposure hour rises while total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001 and VALID_0DTE metrics are unchanged.

name: Charm Pin Conditional Tail Gate
risk: The signature may block some profitable charm-pin recoveries; reject if charm-pin retained PnL or total net profit falls materially without improving worst MAE.
trigger: VALID_0DTE charm_pin_pullback_long entries with high VWAP extension, weak momentum, significant pullback/rejection distance, and moderate setup quality.
validation_metric: Worst MAE improves from -527 toward <= -403 while total net profit stays >=98% of run_001 and fast_under_15m trades remain within 3 of baseline.

name: Pullback-Only Stale 0DTE Fallback
risk: Small sample may overfit the stale-data slice and remove rare valid breakout/squeeze fallback winners.
trigger: 0DTE data is stale or unavailable and router uses no-0DTE fallback profiles.
validation_metric: Fallback PnL remains non-negative, fallback average/worst MAE improves, VALID_0DTE PnL is unchanged, total net profit stays above 98% of run_001, and PnL/exposure hour is flat o...

name: 1DTE Breakout Quality Gate
risk: Small sample and all trades are winners; stricter slope/structure/forward-DEX may remove profitable 1DTE insurance without enough MAE improvement to compensate.
trigger: VALID_1DTE_ONLY routing where 0DTE is unavailable but a 1DTE breakout map exists.
validation_metric: 1DTE PnL/exposure hour and average MAE improve, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001, and VALID_0DTE performance is unchanged.

name: 1DTE Breakout Quality Gate
risk: Small sample with all winners; stricter slope/structure may remove profitable fallback insurance without enough MAE improvement.
trigger: 0DTE unavailable while 1DTE map is valid and breakout_long_1dte is routed.
validation_metric: 1DTE average MAE and worst MAE improve, 1DTE PnL remains at least 95% of current, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001, and VALID_0DTE performance is unchanged.

name: Call Wall Acceptance Sample Builder
risk: One-trade evidence can overfit; relaxed acceptance may add low-quality wall-chase entries or steal signals from stronger pullback profiles.
trigger: VALID_0DTE sessions with positive net DEX, positive forward DEX, and expanding call volume near an upside call wall.
validation_metric: Increase call_wall_acceptance_long to at least 5 trades with positive PnL, PnL per exposure hour above 250, worst MAE better than -100, total net profit at least 98% of run_001,...

evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long had 1 VALID_0DTE trade, $91 PnL, 455 PnL/exposure hour, 12 minute hold, and -11.7 worst MAE. It is too small to promote but materially cleaner than the...
name: Call Wall Acceptance Sample Expansion
risk: Single-trade evidence may be luck; loosening flow gates could add noisy continuation entries or displace better pullback/squeeze trades.
trigger: VALID_0DTE state with accepted call-wall/strike context, positive forward DEX, and call-volume expansion that is present but below the prior stricter threshold.
validation_metric: At least 5 call_wall_acceptance_long trades, positive profile PnL, average MAE below -60, no worsening of total worst MAE, total net profit >= 98% of run_001, and pnl_per_exposu...
